description: Greenfield interactive shadcn staging: stands up a self-contained shadcn + Vite (Tailwind v4) sandbox on its own dev server and renders agent-authored component variants side by side — real interactivity (sort/filter/dialog), not static HTML. For idea-stage / non-React work where design-preview cannot run (no host Vite+React app). Consent-gated, scratch outside the work tree, verified cleanup, static-shell fallback. Includes /shadcn-studio:stage.

interface.longDescription:
Greenfield interactive shadcn staging: stands up a self-contained shadcn + Vite (Tailwind v4) sandbox on its own dev server and renders agent-authored component variants side by side with real interactivity (sort/filter/dialog), not static HTML — for idea-stage or non-React work where design-preview cannot run. Consent-gated, scratch outside the work tree, verified cleanup, static-shell fallback. Includes /shadcn-studio:stage.

Codex fidelity: 2 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
